scope: Re-audit after compliance_analyst route-access fix. Honest report: route-access fix verified at code level + headless guards re-passed; live multi-role click-through cannot be performed by the agent without separate compliance_analyst and requester credentials and therefore remains OPERATOR-VERIFY-REQUIRED.

fix_under_re_audit.blocker: compliance_analyst had no UI route to operate Phase 2 surface (HQ guarded as platform_admin only).
change: src/lib/constants.ts — APP_ROLES.COMPLIANCE_ANALYST added (type-level only; DB role model unchanged).

src/pages/HQ.tsx — HQLayout restrictedToFacilitation prop forces compliance_analyst to the Facilitation tab; non-facilitation deep-links are redirected to /hq/facilitation; tab change handler blocks navigation to other tabs.

verification.code_inspection: PASS — confirmed lines 788-813 (HQLayout restriction) and 932-945 (role-based layout selection) in src/pages/HQ.tsx, and routes in src/App.tsx:232-233.
verification.prebuild_full: PASS — all facilitation guards (drift, audit-names, no-send-path, status-drift, dnc-audit-names) green.

platform_admin_journey.method: code-level wiring inspection (components + edge functions + RLS) — same as prior pass.

results.open_case_drawer: PASS (code) — FacilitationCaseDrawer mounted on row click.
results.approve_archive_templates: PASS (code) — FacilitationOutreachTemplatePanel calls facilitation-outreach-template-status with isPlatformAdmin gate.
results.gate_states_visible: PASS (code) — gateResultBadge renders green/warn/block from server eval.
results.send_one_valid_candidate: OPERATOR-VERIFY-REQUIRED — needs live click-through with a real recipient.
results.idempotency_replay_blocks_double_send: OPERATOR-VERIFY-REQUIRED — must observe two sends with same Idempotency-Key returning replay.
results.cannot_resolve_reopen_escalation: PASS (code+RLS) — resolve button only renders for compliance_analyst; UPDATE policy denies platform_admin.
results.cannot_revoke_dnc: PASS (code+RLS) — revoke button only renders for compliance_analyst; UPDATE policy denies platform_admin.

compliance_analyst_journey.method: code-level RBAC + UI gating inspection. Live impersonation NOT performed.

results.sees_only_facilitation_surface: PASS (code) — HQLayout.restrictedToFacilitation hides every other tab in the rail.
results.deep_link_redirects_to_facilitation: PASS (code) — useEffect in HQLayout replaces URL when tab != 'facilitation'.
results.resolve_escalation: PASS (code+RLS) — UPDATE policy fcesc_update_compliance_analyst + edge fn role check.
results.revoke_dnc: PASS (code+RLS) — UPDATE policy on dnc_rules + edge fn role check.
results.cannot_add_candidates: PASS (code+RLS) — INSERT on candidates denied; edge fn requires platform_admin.
results.cannot_send_outreach: PASS (code+RLS) — INSERT on sends denied; edge fn requires platform_admin.
results.cannot_open_escalation: PASS (code) — Open Escalation button rendered only when isPlatformAdmin.
results.live_click_through: OPERATOR-VERIFY-REQUIRED — agent has no compliance_analyst credentials in this environment.

requester_milestone_privacy.method: RLS inspection of facilitation_case_events and outreach tables (prior pass).

results.sees_only_coarse_outreach_state: PASS (code) — FacilitationCaseMilestoneView renders only outreach_state badge.
results.no_candidate_emails: PASS (RLS) — no SELECT grant on outreach_candidates for non-(admin|analyst).
results.no_audit_payloads: PASS (RLS) — audit_logs not exposed to requester.
results.live_click_through: OPERATOR-VERIFY-REQUIRED — agent has no requester credentials to confirm rendered output.

results.no_generic_edge_function_errors: FAIL — EMB-1 still present. All Phase 2 components surface raw err.message (Edge Function returned a non-2xx status code) instead of parsing the structured error body via parseEdgeError. rg confirms zero usages of parseEdgeError in src/components/facilitation-outreach/ or src/components/facilitation/.
results.plain_english_validation_errors: FAIL — EMB-2 still present. Raw enum codes (dnc_org_name_warning, blocked, etc.) render directly in UI badges/checkboxes; no GATE_REASON_LABELS mapping is applied.
results.successful_actions_refresh_ui: OPERATOR-VERIFY-REQUIRED — refetch hooks exist in components; needs live observation to confirm.

db_edge_ui_event_audit_agreement.template_status: PASS (code) — single edge fn writes both DB row + audit + event.
db_edge_ui_event_audit_agreement.idempotent_replay: PASS (code+test) — covered by gate unit tests; live observation deferred.

remaining_blockers.check: no generic confusing edge-function errors in normal use
remaining_blockers.evidence: rg 'parseEdgeError' src/components/facilitation-outreach/ → no matches. All catch blocks emit raw err.message. Users will see 'Edge Function returned a non-2xx status code' on any server-side reject.
remaining_blockers.likely_cause: EMB-1 fix from prior audit was identified but never applied — was awaiting go-ahead.
remaining_blockers.smallest_safe_fix: Wrap each catch block in src/components/facilitation-outreach/FacilitationOutreachTab.tsx, FacilitationOutreachTemplatePanel.tsx, FacilitationDncRulePanel.tsx with parseEdgeError from src/lib/edge-error.ts before toast.error.

remaining_blockers.evidence: Raw codes (dnc_org_name_warning, blocked, suppressed_email, etc.) render verbatim in gateResultBadge and ack checkboxes.
remaining_blockers.likely_cause: EMB-2 fix from prior audit was identified but never applied.
remaining_blockers.smallest_safe_fix: Introduce GATE_REASON_LABELS / OUTREACH_STATE_LABELS maps in src/lib/facilitation-labels.ts and use them in the three components.

remaining_blockers.check: Live multi-role click-through (platform_admin + compliance_analyst + requester) with screenshots
remaining_blockers.evidence: Agent does not have separate compliance_analyst or requester credentials to exercise the UI as those roles. Code-level wiring is verified but live rendering for those roles is not.
remaining_blockers.likely_cause: Environment limitation — multi-role manual testing must be operator-driven.
remaining_blockers.smallest_safe_fix: Operator must perform the platform-admin-checklist.md, compliance-analyst-checklist.md, and requester privacy checks live, capturing screenshots under ./screenshots/.

verdict_reason: Compliance_analyst route-access fix is verified clean. However: (1) EMB-1 and EMB-2 client-embarrassment defects identified in the previous audit were never applied, so operators and analysts still see raw edge-function error strings and raw enum codes — the exact 'embarrassing' class of issue called out by the client. (2) Live multi-role click-through cannot be performed by the agent without compliance_analyst and requester credentials. Both must be cleared before declaring CLIENT_UAT_READY.
